useCases.name: Allocation Hold For Delinquent Cases
preConditions: Delinquent cases are classified and mapped to the communication templates for auto communication.
postConditions: Delinquent case is not allotted and kept on hold.

workflow.action: Extracts the list of delinquent cases by providing details such as Loan No./Account No, Customer Name, Customer ID, Card No., Overdue position, Financier, Financier Type (Line of business), Rule Unit Code, Unit Level, Product type, Product, Queue, Branch
Allocates, re-allocates, or holds the delinquent cases
Keeps delinquent cases on hold to prevent reallocation despite satisfying conditions

useCases.name: Define Allocation For Delinquent Customers
preConditions: Delinquent cases are classified and mapped to the communication templates for auto communication.
System should allow to do the modifications in existing allocations
postConditions: Delinquent case is assigned to Collector.

workflow.action: Defines the rules in allocation and prepares the delinquent case

Maps the delinquent case to the Collector providing strategy, financier, financier type, queue code, rule code, rule unit level, rule unit code, unit level, unit code, percentage allocation, execution sequence, maker ID, and making date
Provides the percentage of allocation and specifies the priority
Saves the details in the system for future reference

useCases.name: Manual Allocation For Delinquent Customers
preConditions: The allocations would have already been defined.
postConditions: Delinquent cases are assigned to Collector.

workflow.action: Defines the rules in allocation and maps the queue with the allocation rule.

Allots the delinquent case to the Collector providing details such as Loan No., Customer Name, Customer ID, Card No., Days past Due, Financier, Financier Type, Rule Unit Code, Unit Level, Product type, Product, Queue, Branch.
Selects the Unit level and Unit code as bulk or selective manual allocation for cases not allotted to any collector in the past.
Selects the delinquent cases from the list and allocates them to the collector based on percentage of allocation and priority.
Saves the manual allocation made in the system for future reference.

useCases.name: Manual Reallocation For Delinquent Customers
preConditions: Delinquent cases are classified and mapped to the communication templates for auto communication
Case allocation had to be completed
postConditions: Delinquent case is Re-assigned to other Collector who can handle more effectively than the existing collector

workflow.action: Displays delinquent cases based on the queue defined

Updates details before re-assigning to new collector if required (Loan No./Account No, Customer Name, Customer ID, Card No., Overdue position, Financier, Financier Type, Rule Unit Code, Unit Level, Product type, Product, Queue, Branch)
Selects delinquent cases and assigns to new collector who handles cases more efficiently and reports to him

useCases.name: Beginning of Day Process
preConditions: Details of delinquent and non delinquent customers should be available in database.
postConditions: System shows the details of delinquent, non delinquent customers and user views the same.

workflow.action: Opens the Collections management application and navigates to BOD process.
Enters the line of business (Credit card/ Over draft/ Finance) and initiates the process for BOD.
Displays details of delinquent customers including total loan amount, outstanding loan amount, customer/co-applicant/guarantor details, due date, due amount, and customer contact details.
Checks the displayed delinquent customers data and proceeds for classification of delinquent cases.

useCases.name: Defining a Queue
preConditions: BOD process completed
Availability of delinquent and non delinquent customers details in database
postConditions: Map the Classification rule to Queue

workflow.action: Defines the rules in allocation and prepares the delinquent case
Defines the Queue by providing Strategy, Financier, Financier Type, Queue Code, Rule Code, Severity, Execution Sequence, Maker ID, and Making Date
Maps the queue with the classification rule with a product and financier
Provides the Queue description
Saves the details in the system for future reference

useCases.name: Contact recording
preConditions: Delinquent cases should be saved in Database.
System should allow Supervisor to prioritize and allocate the cases to collector.
System should allow user to record details of the follow-up action.
postConditions: Action details are saved in system.

workflow.action: Defines priority for cases based on Amount Overdue Method and allocates cases to collector
Initiates follow-up process after allocation completion
Opens customer details page and views delinquent customer details
Checks customer details and contacts delinquent customer using appropriate curing action
Records follow-up action and remarks in system
Inputs follow-up details including action date, start time, action type, contact mode, person contacted, place contacted, next action date/time, reminder mode, contacted by, and remarks
Submits follow-up details to save in system and proceeds with further process

useCases.name: Legal Collections workflow
preConditions: Client should be delinquent customer.
postConditions: Records the details of the court proceedings and updates in Collections management application.

workflow.action: Sends the delinquent customer documents to legal collection process team and marks for Legal Collection in Collections management application.
Allocates the case to concerned lawyer depending upon the delinquent customer.
Sends the legal notice to customer with the help of lawyer.
Files the cases against delinquent customer.
Presents documents and evidences against the customer to the court.
Records the details of the court proceedings and updates the verdicts pronounced by the court in Collections management application.

useCases.name: Prioritizing a Queue
preConditions: BOD process completed
Availability of delinquent and non delinquent customers details in database
Mapping of Classification rule to Queue should be done
postConditions: Prioritized the queue to set the priority of the various queues defined

workflow.action: Defines the queue by mapping the classification rule with a product and financier
Sets the priority of the various queues defined
Defines the Prioritize Queue by providing Strategy, Financier, Financier Type, Queue Code, and Making Date
Provides the Execution sequence to set the priority of the various queues
Saves the details in the system for future reference

useCases.name: Queue communication mapping
preConditions: BOD process completed
Availability of delinquent and non delinquent customers details in database
Mapping of Classification and curing action should be initiated
postConditions: System communicates to the customer against the curing action

workflow.action: Defines the queue by mapping the classification rule with a product and financier
Sets the priority of the various queues defined
Specifies the various curing actions for mapping to the communication template
Maps the queue with communication template manually
Automatically communicates to the customer on the basis of the curing action selected
Saves the details in the system for future reference

useCases.name: Queue Curing
preConditions: BOD process completed
Availability of delinquent and non delinquent customers details in database
Mapping of Classification rule to Queue should be done
postConditions: Specifies the curing action that is to be used for the follow-up action on the cases associated with that queue

workflow.action: Defines the queue by mapping the classification rule with a product and financier
Sets the priority of the various queues defined
Specifies the curing actions by providing strategy, financier, financier type, queue code, and making date
Specifies curing actions such as letter generation, SMS sending, stat card, tele calling, and email
Uses the curing action for the follow-up action on the cases associated with that queue
Saves the details in the system for future reference

useCases.name: Work Plan
preConditions: Delinquent cases should be saved in Database.
System should allow Supervisor to prioritize and allocate the cases to collector
postConditions: Delinquent cases allocated to collector for follow-up

workflow.action: Completes the allocation process for delinquent customers
Initiates the process for Work Plan
Displays work plan page with loan account details, customer name, financier type, product, amount overdue, principal outstanding, late fee, installment overdue, and remarks
Checks the details and defines priority based on amount overdue
Allocates cases to collector for follow-up
